instruction: Exit the bathroom, wait at the white rug in the hallway.

text: I'm starting to look at this problem.

Exit is ahead (0°) — a doorway opens to a hallway/bedroom area. Let me head toward it.

The hallway doorway (wood floor) is ahead-center. Let me advance toward it, avoiding the shower on the left.

I can see the white rug in the hallway ahead on the wood floor at the bottom-right of my view. I need to navigate through the doorway and head toward it, so I'll turn right slightly to move in that direction.

I've reached the white rug in the hallway, which is the goal. I'm positioned at it, close enough that I'm clearly at the target location. I should stop here and issue the stop command.
